name: Codemod
description: Codemod — AI-assisted large-scale codebase migration platform for automated refactoring and API upgrades.

seo.title: Codemod — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Codemod: Codemod — AI-assisted large-scale codebase migration platform for automated refactoring and API upgrades.

when_to_use: Running community-maintained codemods for major library upgrades
Automating API breaking-change migrations at monorepo scale
Building custom codemods for internal framework version bumps
Applying code transformations consistently across thousands of files

pros: AI-assisted authoring cuts codemod writing time sharply
Registry of prebuilt mods for React, Next.js, and more
Handles multi-repo rollouts with PR automation
cons: Overkill for small codebases or ad-hoc refactors
Complex migrations still need significant human review
Pricing for team tier is opaque until sales call
Quality of community codemods varies widely
review.verdict: The right tool when you are migrating a large monorepo across major versions; otherwise use ast-grep or jscodeshift directly.
review.best_for: Platform and DX teams running cross-repo framework or API migrations
review.not_for: Solo developers and small projects where a single PR beats tooling overhead
